landing.heroWedge: AI writes the code. You learn why it works.
landing.heroSubtitle: Real code in your browser. XP for every lesson. A credential that lives in your wallet.
landing.step1Desc: Rust, Anchor and TypeScript challenges in your browser, graded by hidden tests. No setup, no videos to sit through.
landing.step2Desc: Lessons mint soulbound XP straight to your wallet. Levels, streaks and daily quests keep score on a live leaderboard.
landing.step3Desc: Finish a course and mint a soulbound credential NFT. Anyone can verify it on-chain. Superteam Earn bounties are the next step.
landing.step3Hint: click the card to flip it
landing.featureCommunityDesc: Ask questions, share knowledge, and earn XP from helping others. Peer learning with voting and accepted answers.
landing.featureStreaksDesc: Keep your streak alive with daily completions. Bonus XP for finishing daily quests.
landing.featureOssDesc: Built by Superteam Brasil, open to everyone. Fork it, extend it, make it yours.
landing.gamificationCopy: Earn XP for every lesson. Unlock {count} achievements. Compete on the leaderboard.
landing.ctaAuthMethods: Sign in with your wallet, Google, or GitHub

courses.catalogSubtitle: Explore our courses and start building on Solana

courses.noCoursesDescription: Check back soon for new learning content.

lesson.solutionWarning: Are you sure? Viewing the solution won't award full XP.
lesson.completionFailedChallenge: Your code passed the sample tests, but the server's full test suite — including hidden edge cases the browser doesn't run — didn't pass. Revisit your solution and submit again.
lesson.completionFailedEnrollment: We couldn't verify your on-chain enrollment for this course. Please re-enroll and try again.
lesson.completionFailedGeneric: We couldn't complete this lesson. Please try again in a moment.

settings.googleAlreadyLinked: This Google account is already linked to another account.
settings.linkFailed: Failed to link account. Please try again.
settings.cannotUnlinkLastHint: You must have at least one sign-in method. Link another method before unlinking this one.
settings.unlinkFailed: Could not unlink this method. Please try again.
settings.githubAlreadyLinked: This GitHub account is already linked to another account.
settings.exportFailed: Could not export your data. Please try again.
settings.privacyUpdateFailed: Could not update privacy setting. Please try again.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Request permanent deletion of your account. Your profile is anonymized and hidden, and you are signed out. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountOnChainNotice: Your on-chain XP and credential NFTs are permanent and live on the Solana blockchain. They are bound to your wallet and cannot be erased by deleting your account.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmBody: This anonymizes your profile, removes your bio and avatar, hides you from public pages, and signs you out. Your on-chain XP and credentials remain permanently on-chain. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountFailed: Could not delete your account. Please try again.
